examples.sentence: この本は読みがいがあります。
examples.translation: This book is worth reading.
examples.translationEn: This book is worth reading.
examples.romaji: Kono hon wa yomi-gai ga arimasu.

examples.sentence: 早起きしがいがあると思いますよ。
examples.translation: I think it's worth waking up early.
examples.translationEn: I think it's worth waking up early.
examples.romaji: Hayaoki shigai ga aru to omoimasu yo.

examples.sentence: 長い時間をかけがいのある仕事だ。
examples.translation: It's a job worth spending a long time on.
examples.translationEn: It's a job worth spending a long time on.
examples.romaji: Nagai jikan o kake-gai no aru shigoto da.

examples.sentence: 彼とは話しがいがあるでしょう。
examples.translation: It's worth talking to him.
examples.translationEn: It's worth talking to him.
examples.romaji: Kare to wa hanashi-gai ga aru deshō.

examples.sentence: 毎日勉強したかいがあって、テストに合格しました。
examples.translation: Studying every day paid off—I passed the test.
examples.translationEn: Studying every day paid off—I passed the test.
examples.romaji: Mainichi benkyō shita kai ga atte, tesuto ni gōkaku shimashita.

examples.sentence: 練習のかいがあって、試合に勝つことができた。
examples.translation: The practice paid off, and we were able to win the match.
examples.translationEn: The practice paid off, and we were able to win the match.
examples.romaji: Renshū no kai ga atte, shiai ni katsu koto ga dekita.

examples.sentence: 雨の中を走ってきたかいがあって、電車に間に合った。
examples.translation: Running in the rain was worth it, as I made it to the train on time.
examples.translationEn: Running in the rain was worth it, as I made it to the train on time.
examples.romaji: Ame no naka o hashitte kita kai ga atte, densha ni maniatta.

examples.sentence: 早起きして掃除をしたかいがあって、部屋がきれいになった。
examples.translation: Waking up early to clean paid off; the room is now spotless.
examples.translationEn: Waking up early to clean paid off; the room is now spotless.
examples.romaji: Hayaoki shite sōji o shita kai ga atte, heya ga kirei ni natta.

examples.sentence: 長い間苦労したかいもなく、失敗してしまった。
examples.translation: I struggled for a long time, but in the end, it was all in vain and I failed.
examples.translationEn: I struggled for a long time, but in the end, it was all in vain and I failed.
examples.romaji: Nagai aida kurō shita kai mo naku, shippai shite shimatta.

examples.sentence: このプロジェクトにたくさん時間をかけたかいもなく、うまくいかなかった。
examples.translation: I spent a lot of time on this project, but it ended fruitlessly.
examples.translationEn: I spent a lot of time on this project, but it ended fruitlessly.
examples.romaji: Kono purojekuto ni takusan jikan o kaketa kai mo naku, umaku ikanakatta.

examples.sentence: 助けを求めたかいもなく、誰も来なかった。
examples.translation: He asked for help, but it was in vain as no one came.
examples.translationEn: He asked for help, but it was in vain as no one came.
examples.romaji: Tasuke o motometa kai mo naku, dare mo konakatta.

examples.sentence: 色々な方法でダイエットを試みたかいもなく、全然痩せなかった。
examples.translation: I tried various diet methods, but it was all for nothing—I didn't lose any weight.
examples.translationEn: I tried various diet methods, but it was all for nothing—I didn't lose any weight.
examples.romaji: Iroirona hōhō de daietto o kokoromita kai mo naku, zenzen yasenakatta.

examples.sentence: 彼女は食べかけのリンゴを置いて出かけた。
examples.translation: She left a partially eaten apple and went out.
examples.translationEn: She left a partially eaten apple and went out.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa tabe-kake no ringo o oite dekaketa.

examples.sentence: 子供たちはやりかけの宿題を机の上に残した。
examples.translation: The children left their half-finished homework on the desk.
examples.translationEn: The children left their half-finished homework on the desk.
examples.romaji: Kodomotachi wa yari-kake no shukudai o tsukue no ue ni nokoshita.

examples.sentence: 読みかけの本を夜になると探す。
examples.translation: I look for the book I started reading once night comes.
examples.translationEn: I look for the book I started reading once night comes.
examples.romaji: Yomi-kake no hon o yoru ni naru to sagasu.

examples.sentence: オフィスには、作りかけの書類がたくさんある。
examples.translation: There are a lot of documents in the process of being created in the office.
examples.translationEn: There are a lot of documents in the process of being created in the office.
examples.romaji: Ofisu ni wa, tsukuri-kake no shorui ga takusan aru.

examples.sentence: 彼は風邪を引きがちです。
examples.translation: He tends to catch colds easily.
examples.translationEn: He tends to catch colds easily.
examples.romaji: Kare wa kaze o hiki-gachi desu.

examples.sentence: この地域は雨が降りがちです。
examples.translation: This area tends to get a lot of rain.
examples.translationEn: This area tends to get a lot of rain.
examples.romaji: Kono chiiki wa ame ga furi-gachi desu.

examples.sentence: 彼女は忘れ物をしがちです。
examples.translation: She tends to forget things.
examples.translationEn: She tends to forget things.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa wasuremono o shi-gachi desu.

examples.sentence: 私は遅刻しがちなので、もっと早く起きないといけません。
examples.translation: I tend to be late, so I need to wake up earlier.
examples.translationEn: I tend to be late, so I need to wake up earlier.
examples.romaji: Watashi wa chikoku shi-gachi na no de, motto hayaku okinai to ikemasen.

examples.sentence: 駅に着くか着かないかのうちに、雨が降り出した。
examples.translation: No sooner had I arrived at the station than it started raining.
examples.translationEn: No sooner had I arrived at the station than it started raining.
examples.romaji: Eki ni tsuku ka tsukanai ka no uchi ni, ame ga furidashita.

examples.sentence: ケータイを買うか買わないかのうちに、新しいモデルが発売された。
examples.translation: As soon as I decided to buy the cell phone, a new model was released.
examples.translationEn: As soon as I decided to buy the cell phone, a new model was released.
examples.romaji: Keitai o kau ka kawanai ka no uchi ni, atarashii moderu ga hatsubai sareta.

examples.sentence: 彼が家を出るか出ないかのうちに、電話が鳴った。
examples.translation: The moment he left the house, the phone rang.
examples.translationEn: The moment he left the house, the phone rang.
examples.romaji: Kare ga ie o deru ka denai ka no uchi ni, denwa ga natta.

examples.sentence: パーティーが始まるか始まらないかのうちに、彼女が泣き出した。
examples.translation: As soon as the party began, she started crying.
examples.translationEn: As soon as the party began, she started crying.
examples.romaji: Pātī ga hajimaru ka hajimaranai ka no uchi ni, kanojo ga nakidashita.

examples.sentence: 彼はあまりにも無責任で、約束を破りかねない。
examples.translation: He is so irresponsible that he might break his promise.
examples.translationEn: He is so irresponsible that he might break his promise.
examples.romaji: Kare wa amarini mo musekinin de, yakusoku o yaburi-kane nai.

examples.sentence: 注意しないと、事故を起こしかねない。
examples.translation: If you don't pay attention, you might cause an accident.
examples.translationEn: If you don't pay attention, you might cause an accident.
examples.romaji: Chūi shinai to, jiko o okoshi-kane nai.

examples.sentence: このアプリはバグが多いので、クラッシュしかねない。
examples.translation: Since this app has many bugs, it might crash.
examples.translationEn: Since this app has many bugs, it might crash.
examples.romaji: Kono apuri wa bagu ga ōi no de, kurasshu shi-kane nai.

examples.sentence: 彼女は緊張しているので、失敗しかねない。
examples.translation: She's so nervous that she might fail.
examples.translationEn: She's so nervous that she might fail.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa kinchō shite iru no de, shippai shi-kane nai.

examples.sentence: その問題は難しいので、私には解決しかねます。
examples.translation: Since that problem is difficult, I cannot solve it.
examples.translationEn: Since that problem is difficult, I cannot solve it.
examples.romaji: Sono mondai wa muzukashii no de, watashi ni wa kaiketsu shi-kanemasu.

examples.sentence: 彼の言っていることが真実かどうか判断しかねます。
examples.translation: I cannot judge whether what he is saying is true or not.
examples.translationEn: I cannot judge whether what he is saying is true or not.
examples.romaji: Kare no itte iru koto ga shinjitsu ka dō ka handan shi-kanemasu.

examples.sentence: 彼女が来るかどうか今すぐには分かりかねます。
examples.translation: I cannot immediately know whether she will come or not.
examples.translationEn: I cannot immediately know whether she will come or not.
examples.romaji: Kanojo ga kuru ka dō ka ima sugu ni wa wakari-kanemasu.

examples.sentence: 詳しい内容については説明しかねます。
examples.translation: I cannot explain the details.
examples.translationEn: I cannot explain the details.
examples.romaji: Kuwashii naiyō ni tsuite wa setsumei shi-kanemasu.
